intentSynonyms: update a product quantity in starbucks
edit a product quantity in starbucks
change the details of product quantity in starbucks
modify a product quantity in starbucks
change cart item quantity or remove it in starbucks
description: Change the quantity of a product already in the cart. Set quantity to 0 to remove it. Get the item_key from get_cart.

quantity.description: New quantity (0 to remove the item)
